output: Selected .github/workflows/claude-code-review.yml as the executable owner for an attached concurrency edit without treating it as governed automation.
Kept the unverified README finding in an isolated report-only candidate with reviewer, publisher, quarantine/recovery, target revision, and post-publication readback fields.
Required HGI-304 authority and HGI-306 cost/false-positive evidence before retention as governed continuous automation.
limitations: Repository workflow text does not prove GitHub execution, credentials, comments, convergence, cost, or effectiveness.
nonClaims: The background scan neither established a stale pointer nor authorized a correction or publication.
